findings.location: s1 — 要求電文・応答電文フォーマット定義ファイル コードブロック
findings.description: Inline field comments are stripped from both format definition code examples. The source includes semantic annotations such as `# レコード区分(固定)`, `# 採番したユーザID`, `# 障害事由コード`, `# 問い合わせID`, `# データ区分(固定)` that explain the meaning and fixed-value constraints of each field. These are relevant for AI to explain field semantics or guide implementation.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines such as: `1   dataKbn  X(1)  "2"   # レコード区分(固定)`, `2   userId   X(10)       # 採番したユーザID`, `12  failureCode X(20)  # 障害事由コード`, `32  userInfoId  X(20)  # 問い合わせID`

findings.location: s2 — Actionクラス コードブロック
findings.description: The method signature including `@OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "forward://RW11AC0201")` and `@OnDoubleSubmission(path = "forward://RW11AC0201")` with their specific parameters is omitted from the code example. These annotation parameters (error type, forward paths) represent concrete configuration decisions for correct error handling and double-submission prevention in sync messaging actions.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines: `@OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "forward://RW11AC0201")` and `@OnDoubleSubmission(path = "forward://RW11AC0201")` appear directly above the method `doRW11AC0205`
